name: #AbdominalPain
controller_advice: Collect details about the location, intensity, and nature of the pain. Inquire about other associated symptoms or factors, such as vomiting or recent surgeries. Advise the caller to refrain from giving food or liquids to the person experiencing the pain. Based on the severity of symptoms, dispatch EMS for evaluation and potential transport to a medical facility.

name: #AccidentalPress
controller_advice: The user accidentally activated a panic. Provide reassurance so that the user is at ease and resolve the panic after confirming the user's security code or last four digits.

name: #AccountIssue
controller_advice: Relating to user account, i.e. amounts outstanding, payments outstanding, account balance,etc.: Refer the user to the in-app support or southafrica@bolt.eu.

name: #AggravatedAssault
controller_advice: Assualt with the intent to inflict serious bodily harm: Keep the person calm, instruct them to find a safe place, do not engage. Contact law enforcement.

name: #AggravatedRobbery
controller_advice: Robbery with aggravating circumstances:

name: #AllergicReaction
controller_advice: Determine the severity of the reaction and ask if the person has a known allergy or carries an epinephrine auto-injector (e.g., EpiPen). Instruct the caller to administer the auto-injector if available and guide them on proper usage if needed. Dispatch EMS for immediate medical care and advise the caller to keep the person calm and monitor their condition.

name: #AmbulanceOnScene
controller_advice: The patient may receive oxygen, medications, ECG monitoring, fluid administration or a host of other interventions. If the patient is conscious, treatment options should be discussed with both the patient and family members. EMS will generally transport to the hospital designated by the patient

name: #AmbulanceTransportingClient
controller_advice: Patient was treated on scene and transported to the nearest hospital for treatment

name: #AnythingElseICanAssistWith?
controller_advice: Anything else I can assist you with is a polite way to offer help to someone. If someone indicates they don't need more help, it's best to respect their wishes. However, you can ask if they're sure, in case they're hesitant to ask for help.

name: #APITesting
controller_advice: Client testing API panics. Ask involved parties before resolving the panic.

name: #AppAbuse
controller_advice: The user is abusing the panic button by continuously pressing it for non-emergency situations for which we cannot dispatch armed response.

name: #AppSupport
controller_advice: App related issues, bugs, or FAQ: Refer the user to app support or southafrica@bolt.eu.

name: #ArmedRobbery
controller_advice: Theft or robbery committed with the use of firearms:Advise the person to comply with the robber's demands for their safety. Remember as much detail as possible. Contact law enforcement.

name: #ArrivedAfterCancellation
controller_advice: RO arrived but was cancelled while en route to the location.

name: #ArrivedAtLocation
controller_advice: When the responder arrives at the correct location as given on the dashboard.

name: #Arson
controller_advice: Intentional act of setting fire to property:Determine location, advise evacuation if necessary, contact fire department

name: #AttemptedHomeInvasion
controller_advice: Attempted to enter a property unauthorized with intent to commit a crime: Remain quiet, do not confront the burglars. Remember as much detail for the police. Call law enforcement.

name: #AttemptedMurder
controller_advice: Unsuccessful attempt to cause someone's death:Gather information, dispatch emergency services, ensure safety

name: #AttemptedSuicide
controller_advice: A suicide attempt is when someone harms themselves with any intent to end their life, but they do not die as a result of their actions.

name: #AttemptedTheft
controller_advice: User trying to steal something but not succeeding

name: #AttemtedHijacking
controller_advice: to seize possession or control of a vehicle from another person by threat of force: Remain calm, follow the hijacker's instructions for safety. Remember as much detail for the police.

name: #BeingStalked
controller_advice: Persistent unwanted attention or harassment from an individual:Gather information, advise caller to document incidents, report to police

name: #BLEButtonIssue
controller_advice: Bluetooth button giving problems. Refer the client to the Support Desk for support documentation and submit a ticket.

name: #Bleeding
controller_advice: Ask the caller to apply direct pressure to the bleeding site using a clean cloth or their hand. Instruct them to elevate the injured area, if possible, and maintain pressure until the bleeding stops or medical help arrives. Dispatch EMS for further assessment and potential transportation to a medical facility.

name: #Breakdown
controller_advice: Breakdown of a vehicle usually requires Roadside Assistance: Find out if the user requires Armed Response.

name: #BreakIn
controller_advice: 1. Confirm possible break-in 2. Notify the response company 3. Notify SAPS and get a ref number

name: #BurglaryForced
controller_advice: Unauthorized forced entry into a building with intent to commit an offense:Remain quiet, do not confront the burglars. Remember as much detail for the police. Call law enforcement.

name: #BurglaryUnforced
controller_advice: Unauthorized entry (without force) into a building with the intent to commit an offense: Advise the person not to touch anything to preserve evidence. Call law enforcement.

name: #Burns
controller_advice: Determine the severity and extent of the burn. Instruct the caller to cool the burn under running water for at least 10 minutes, if possible. Advise against applying ice, creams, or ointments. Dispatch EMS for assessment and further treatment.

name: #BusinessRobbery
controller_advice: Unauthorized entry into a business property with intent to commit a crime:Instruct the person to stay calm, not to confront the robbers. Remember details. Contact law enforcement.

name: #CallCentreMarketing
controller_advice: Client heard of CASI through a call centre marketing call.

name: #CallNotAnswered
controller_advice: The alerter does not answer.: Call again, or try to call the other participants (ride) / emergency contacts.

name: #CancelledBeforeArrival
controller_advice: RO was cancelled before arrival therefore he could have been en route but ended up not finishing the response.

name: #CancelledBeforeDispatch
controller_advice: Panic was cancelled before the partner successfully dispatched a vehicle.

name: #CardiacArrest
controller_advice: Instruct the caller to immediately start CPR (if trained) and provide clear instructions for performing chest compressions. Dispatch emergency medical services (EMS) to the location and stay on the line to offer guidance and support until help arrives.

name: #CellphoneTheft
controller_advice: This is a tag for incidents where the cellphone of a victim is taken without their permission with the intent to permanently deprive them of it.

name: #ChestPain
controller_advice: Collect details about the location and characteristics of the chest pain, such as intensity and duration. Instruct the caller to stay calm and avoid exertion. Dispatch EMS to evaluate the situation.

name: #ChildFound
controller_advice: When someone find a child report it to SAPS.

name: #ChildInvolved
controller_advice: When speaking to a child remember to be gentle and reassuring. If the child is the one in trouble then use it to push urgency from our responders.

name: #ChildServices
controller_advice: Any panic where children are in danger: Child services should be contacted. They'll need the location, child information and description. Dispatch a Partner and SAPS.

name: #Choking
controller_advice: Ask the caller if the person can speak or cough. If they are unable to breathe cough or speak, instruct the caller to perform the Heimlich maneuver (abdominal thrusts) if trained. If the person becomes unresponsive, guide the caller to start CPR until EMS arrives.

name: #C-I-T-Heist
controller_advice: Cash-in-transit heist involving robbery or theft of money in transit:Gather information, ensure caller's safety, dispatch appropriate authorities

name: #Collision
controller_advice: Ensure the user's safety first. Encourage them to document the scene, and call the police if necessary.

name: #CommercialCrime
controller_advice: Criminal activities targeting businesses or involving business operations:Gather details, notify relevant authorities

name: #CommunityDisruption
controller_advice: Community Disruption

name: #Deceased
controller_advice: Please stay calm and follow my instructions carefully. Please leave everything as is and remain where you are if it's safe, or move to a secure location nearby. We need to preserve the scene for emergency services.

name: #DelayedETA
controller_advice: ETA received very late into the panic. Escalate to partner management and notifiy CASI management.

name: #DevTesting
controller_advice: This occurrence/incident is a test. The developer is probably troubleshooting something.

name: #Diabetic
controller_advice: This tag must be used for clients who are reporting diabetic medical emergencies

name: #DifficultyBreathing
controller_advice: Gather information about the person's condition, such as any known respiratory conditions or triggers. Instruct the caller to stay calm and in a well-ventilated area. Dispatch EMS for further assessment and treatment.

name: #Disturbance
controller_advice: When a client is complaining about people making noise or being disruptive use this tag as long as no violence or vandalism occurs.

name: #DomesticAbuse
controller_advice: Violence or aggression that occurs in the domestic setting:Ensure person is safe. Listen and provide support. Advise them to contact local law enforcement and a local domestic violence hotline.

name: #Drinking&Driving
controller_advice: Operating a vehicle while under the influence of alcohol or drugs:Gather details, advise against driving, inform police

name: #DriverAttemptingRobbery
controller_advice: Advise the rider to prioritize their safety, remain calm, and avoid escalating the situation. Recommend reporting the incident to southafrica@bolt.eu or through the e-hailing app and dispatch SAPS immediately.

name: #DriverIssue
controller_advice: Problems with the driver's behavior, driving style, the driver did not show up, or other issues: Encourage the user to report the issue to Bolt. Notify law enforcement if necessary.

name: #DriverNotArrived
controller_advice: The e-hailing driver did not arrive at the pickup location after accepting the ride.

name: #DropOff
controller_advice: Client to be dropped off at the end location of the Ride.

name: #Drowning
controller_advice: Ask the caller if the person is still in the water or has been removed. If the person is unresponsive and not breathing, guide the caller to initiate CPR immediately.

name: #DrugCrime
controller_advice: Activities related to the production, distribution, and consumption of illegal substances:Do not engage or intervene. Remember as many details for a police report. Contact law enforcement.

name: #Drugs
controller_advice: Any substance (other than food) that is used to prevent or diagnose treat or relieve symptoms - Seek Medical assistance

name: #DuplicatePanic
controller_advice: System duplicated a panic.: Resolve the last panic that came in.

name: #Dynamicformcomplete
controller_advice: This tag captures the completion event while logging the user's geographic location and verified proof of presence to ensure submission authenticity.

name: #ElectricFenceAlarm
controller_advice: Validate the alarm. Contact the user if possible. Dispatch a response team or notify law enforcement if needed.

name: #ElectricShock
controller_advice: Ensure the caller's safety by asking them to disconnect the power source if possible or to move away from the electrical hazard. Instruct the caller not to touch the person if they are still in contact with the electrical source.

name: #Epilepsy
controller_advice: Neurological condition involving the brain that makes people more susceptible to having recurrent unprovoked seizures. Gently guide the person to the ground or a soft surface if possible. Support their head to prevent injury.

name: #FeelingUnsafe
controller_advice: Perception of being in a dangerous or threatening situation:Provide reassurance, advise caller to seek safety, involve authorities

name: #FireAlarm
controller_advice: Validate the alarm. Contact the user if possible. Notify fire department immediately if validation is positive.

name: #FireNaturalDisaster
controller_advice: Uncontrolled fire or natural catastrophes such as floods, earthquakes:Leave the area safely, if possible. Follow local authorities' instructions. Contact local emergency services.

name: #ForcedEntryHouseRobbery
controller_advice: Unauthorized forced entry into a residential property with intent to commit a crime: Remain quiet, do not confront the robbers. Remember as much detail for the police. Call law enforcement.

name: #Fracture
controller_advice: Instruct the caller to immobilize the injured area by supporting it with a splint, if available, or by keeping it as still as possible. Dispatch EMS for evaluation, treatment, and potential transport to a medical facility.

name: #Fraud
controller_advice: Deception intended for personal gain or to cause a loss to another party:Do not share any further personal or financial information. Document all details. Contact law enforcement and bank if necessary.

name: #GangFights
controller_advice: Where a group of gangs are fighting in the street, Get response out as well as SAPS.

name: #GangRelated
controller_advice: Encourage the reporter to stay safe, avoid direct confrontation, and provide critical information without compromising their security.

name: #GBH
controller_advice: Serious physical attack likely to cause severe injury: Ensure the person is safe. If possible apply first aid. Contact medical services and law enforcement.

name: #GBV
controller_advice: This tag is used to flag panics that reference gender-based violence including physical emotional sexual or psychological abuse directed at individuals based on their gender.

name: #GoodNewsStory
controller_advice: Capture as much details about the incident as possible and ask the user to rate the panic and leave a comment.

name: #GroupFights
controller_advice: Fight between more than 2 people: Guide the user to not confront any of the people. Go to a safe place if possible.

name: #HeadInjury
controller_advice: Inquire about the mechanism of injury and the person's level of consciousness. Instruct the caller to monitor the person closely for changes in their condition, advise against moving them unnecessarily, and keep them still until EMS arrives.

name: #Heatstroke
controller_advice: Instruct the caller to move the person to a cooler environment, remove excess clothing, and cool them down using cool water or wet towels.

name: #Hijacking
controller_advice: Forcibly taking control of a vehicle:Remain calm, follow the hijacker's instructions for safety. Remember as much detail for the police.

name: #HomeInvasion
controller_advice: Unauthorized entry with intent to commit a crime, often theft:Remain quiet, do not confront the burglars. Remember as much detail for the police. Call law enforcement.

name: #Homicide
controller_advice: Unlawful killing of another human being:Ensure the person is safe. If possible, apply first aid. Contact medical services and law enforcement.

name: #HouseFire
controller_advice: Dispatched armed response Fire department and Medical assistance to the location - Identify any injuries due to fire

name: #Hypothermia
controller_advice: Instruct the caller to move the person to a warm environment and remove wet clothing. Encourage them to wrap the person in warm blankets or clothing, provide warm liquids if the person is conscious.

name: #IllegalFirearmPossession
controller_advice: Possessing a firearm without the necessary legal permissions or licenses:Do not confront the person with the firearm. Try to remember details. Contact law enforcement.

name: #IllegalStrike
controller_advice: A strike that has become out of hand resulting in sabotage, damage of assets, or Arson: Remain calm and tell the alerter to stay clear of the striking group and seek shelter in a closed-off premises. Dispatch SAPS

name: #InaccurateLocation
controller_advice: Location provided for the Dispatched Panic is inaccurate. Report the incident to management to follow up with the client.

name: #Injury
controller_advice: Inquire about the mechanism of injury (how it happened) and identify the specific location and severity of the trauma. Assess the person's level of consciousness and check for life-threatening symptoms like heavy bleeding or deformity.

name: #Intimidation
controller_advice: Behavior intended to frighten or coerce someone:Gather details, advise caller to ensure personal safety, report to police

name: #IntrusionAlarm
controller_advice: Validate the alarm. Contact the user if possible. Dispatch a response team or notify law enforcement if needed.

name: #IOTDeviceIssue
controller_advice: Personal Tracker/ IOT Device/ Standalone Device giving problems. Refer the client to the Support Desk.

name: #Kidnapping
controller_advice: Unlawful carrying away (asportation) and confinement of a person against their will: Stay calm. Gather as much information as possible. Contact law enforcement immediately.

name: #Labour
controller_advice: Labour is divided into 3 stages. For first-time mothers, labour takes around 12 to 14 hours. Encourage her to move around and get into the position she feels most comfortable in. - Dispatched medical assistance to location

name: #LastFourDigitsConfirmed
controller_advice: Confirming the last four digits of a user's cellphone number or their passphrase is essential

name: #LeftPanicArea
controller_advice: This is when the alerter left the panic area.

name: #LoadShedding
controller_advice: No electricity in the area due to Load shedding.

name: #LongStandOff_30+
controller_advice: This is when a responder is standing off with a client for more than 30min.

name: #LossOfConsciousness
controller_advice: Determine if the person is breathing and if there are any signs of life. If unresponsive and not breathing normally, guide the caller through initiating CPR until EMS arrives.

name: #LostKey
controller_advice: User has lost their car key: Dispatch a locksmith or roadside assistance service. Provide reassurance.

name: #MaliciousPropertyDamage
controller_advice: Malicious damage to property: Call Law enforcement

name: #ManualDispatch
controller_advice: When CASI control room receives a call / panic, but the location differs. We need to get all the information for the manual dispatch.

name: #MechanicalFailure
controller_advice: Breakdown due to engine trouble, battery failure, flat tire, etc.: Provide reassurance. Dispatch a roadside assistance service.

name: #MedicalAlarm
controller_advice: Contact the user to assess the situation. Notify medical services immediately if validation is positive.

name: #MentallyUnstable
controller_advice: Extreme anxiety or paranoia. Delusions or hallucinations. Exhibiting aggressive or violent behavior. - Get SAPS and Medical assistance

name: #MeterTaxiInterference
controller_advice: Interference or disruption of an e-hailing service by a Meter Taxi.: Advise the alerter to prioritize their safety, remain inside the vehicle, and avoid confrontation.

name: #MeterTaxiViolence
controller_advice: Violent or aggressive behavior by a Meter Taxi towards the driver of the e-hailing service.: Advise the caller to prioritize their safety, remain inside the vehicle, and avoid confrontation.

name: #MissingChild
controller_advice: Missing child reported: Contact SAPS immediately. Dispatch all Partners in the Area. Escalate panic on CASI Control WhatsApp group. Keep user updated during the panic.

name: #MissingPerson
controller_advice: Someone who has disappeared and whose status as alive or dead cannot be confirmed:Gather all necessary information about the missing person and their last known whereabouts. Inform them to report to local law enforcement immediately.

name: #MobJustice
controller_advice: The #MobJustice tag describes community actions where crowds punish alleged wrongdoers often violently.

name: #Mugging
controller_advice: Direct theft from a person in a public place, usually with physical force or threats:Advise the person to hand over belongings without resistance for their safety. Contact law enforcement.

name: #Murder
controller_advice: Unlawful killing of another person:Offer condolences, gather details, dispatch emergency services

name: #NetworkIssue
controller_advice: The Partner experienced network issues

name: #NoAmbulanceAvailable
controller_advice: The ambulance services are not available (Public / Private) Ask to be transported to the nearest hospital / clinic by friend, family members to get medical help.

name: #NoContactMade
controller_advice: Controller or RO unable to make contact with the user: Phone Emergency contacts, if loaded. Update Dashboard with why the RO was unable to make contact with the user.

name: #NoGoArea
controller_advice: Responders do not respond to this area as it is deemed too dangerous.: Continue to dispatch SAPS and do everything in our power to respond.

name: #NoInjury
controller_advice: No need of any medical assistance due to no injuries reported.

name: #NonSecurityEmergency
controller_advice: The #NonSecurityEmergency tag is for situations where an armed response partner is dispatched to support an ambulance or other public service in non-threatening circumstances.

name: #NumberBusy
controller_advice: Unable to make contact with the user.

name: #NumberDialedDNE
controller_advice: The number of the alerter does not exist.: Call again, or try to call the other participants (ride / emergency contacts.

name: #OnCoverReceivedSMS
controller_advice: User was added to a cover by his / her company and received an SMS to download the app.

name: #OrgCancellation
controller_advice: Panic was canceled by the organisation that dispatched us.

name: #OutOfFuel
controller_advice: Dispatch a fuel delivery service.

name: #OutofProvince
controller_advice: This tag is created specifically for Gauteng e-Panics which are created by users who are making panics outside of the province of Gauteng

name: #OutOfTripUnreachableDriver
controller_advice: The status of the ride is out-of-trip and the driver cannot be reached.: Escalate the panic if the vehicle is stationary in a commercial area. Resolve the panic if the vehicle is in a residential area.

name: #Overdose
controller_advice: Gather information about the substance(s) involved, the person's symptoms, and their level of consciousness. If they become unresponsive and are not breathing, guide the caller to initiate CPR until EMS arrives.

name: #PanicAlarm
controller_advice: Contact the user to assess the situation. Dispatch a response team or notify law enforcement if needed.

name: #PartnerTraining
controller_advice: Dispatch Panic was created as a result of a new partner training to use the system. Ask the involved parties if the panic may be closed and provide assistance where required.

name: #PassphraseConfirmed
controller_advice: Confirming the last four digits of a user's cellphone number or their passphrase is essential

name: #PatrolRequest
controller_advice: Gather reasons for the patrol request. Evaluate the urgency and nature of the situation. Coordinate with law enforcement or security personnel to dispatch patrols to the requested area.

name: #PayDispute
controller_advice: A disagreement about the fare, tips, or other payment-related issues: Ensure both parties remain calm. Facilitate communication between parties and Bolt support if necessary.

name: #PedestrianBump
controller_advice: The impact of a vehicle hitting a person can result in bone fractures - It depends on injuries to get Medical attention and SAPS out

name: #PhysicalAssault
controller_advice: Non-aggravated physical attack without a weapon: Keep the person calm, instruct them to find a safe place, do not engage. Contact law enforcement.

name: #Poisoning
controller_advice: Ask the caller about the type of substance involved and the person's symptoms. Advise against inducing vomiting unless directed by medical professionals. Dispatch EMS for evaluation and to provide appropriate treatment.

name: #PotholeDamage
controller_advice: Ensure the user's safety. Arrange for vehicle repair or tow service as necessary.

name: #PowerOutageAlarm
controller_advice: Validate the alarm. Contact the user if possible. Coordinate with the service provider to address the issue.

name: #Pregnant
controller_advice: A full-term pregnancy has three trimesters and lasts around 40 weeks. Medical services required

name: #PublicViolence
controller_advice: Public disturbance often involving destruction and disorder:Leave the area if safe, avoid crowds, do not engage in the violence. Contact law enforcement.

name: #RansomExtortion
controller_advice: Demanding money or valuable goods under threats, often for releasing kidnapped victims:Stay calm. Do not negotiate on your own. Gather as much information as possible. Contact law enforcement immediately.

name: #Rape
controller_advice: Penetration without the consent of the victim: Keep the client calm, Urge the client to reach out to local authorities and undergo a rape kit, Call law enforcement

name: #RedZone
controller_advice: Dangerous Area causing delays in the response due to high risk

name: #RiderAttemptingRobbery
controller_advice: Advise the driver to prioritize their safety, remain calm, and avoid escalating the situation. Recommend reporting the incident to southafrica@bolt.eu or through the e-hailing app and dispatch SAPS immediately.

name: #RiderFeelingUnsafe
controller_advice: The rider feels unsafe or threatened during the ride: Advise the rider to prioritize their safety, communicate their concerns to the driver (if comfortable), and request an immediate stop at a safe location if needed.

name: #RiderIssue
controller_advice: When a driver experiences problems with the rider under the influence / not paying his ride / verbal disputes.

name: #RoadsideSecurity
controller_advice: Advise caller to prioritize safety, move to a safe location, and stay inside their vehicle if necessary. Dispatch appropriate assistance.

name: #ROContactMade
controller_advice: RO made contact with the alerter.: Remember to call the alerter to verify his/her safety before resolving.

name: #RONoContactMade
controller_advice: RO arrived but could not make contact with the alerter.: Help the RO to make contact with the alerter by calling emergency contacts and relating Home/ Work Access details. Make sure that the RO is at the correct location.

name: #SAPSArrived
controller_advice: SAPS arrived at the panic location

name: #SAPSCase
controller_advice: Reference to a case handled by the South African Police Service: Gather details and assess the case. Remember to log the case number/ reference number in comments

name: #SAPSNoArrival
controller_advice: SAPS did not arrived at the panic location nor did they provide any assistance. Escalate to management.

name: #SeismicSensorAlarm
controller_advice: Validate the alarm. Contact the user if possible. Dispatch a response team or notify law enforcement if needed.

name: #Seizure
controller_advice: Guide the caller to clear the area around the person to prevent injury. Instruct the caller to time the seizure, stay on the line, and provide reassurance. Once the seizure ends, advise them to place the person in a safe position.

name: #SelfAssisted
controller_advice: This tag is to be used when a client cancels due to them managing to get help or assist themselves before we can.

name: #SexualOffence
controller_advice: Any type of sexual contact or behavior without the explicit consent of the recipient.:Get to safety and preserve any evidence. Express empathy. Contact law enforcement and a crisis center.

name: #Shooting
controller_advice: Firing a gun, either intentionally or accidentally:Instruct the person to take cover, avoid the area. Remember as much detail as possible. Contact law enforcement.

name: #Shoplifting
controller_advice: Theft of merchandise from a retail establishment:Gather information, advise caller to avoid confrontation

name: #Sick
controller_advice: Affected with disease or illness; ailing - Seek medical attention

name: #SocialMedia
controller_advice: Client heard of CASI through social media

name: #Stabbing
controller_advice: Violent act in which a person uses a pointed object to pierce or puncture someone. Can cause serious injury or death, especially if vital organs are hit.

name: #StockTheft
controller_advice: Illegal taking of livestock or agricultural produce:Collect details, advise securing the area, dispatch authorities

name: #Stranded
controller_advice: The user is unable to proceed due to environmental conditions or other unforeseen circumstances: Provide reassurance. Arrange for tow service, emergency services, or other help as appropriate.

name: #Stroke
controller_advice: Use the FAST acronym to assess the situation: Face drooping, Arm weakness, Speech difficulties, and Time to call emergency services. Instruct the caller to note the time the symptoms started.

name: #Suicide
controller_advice: Notify SAPS. Get a ref number. Dispatched medical services to the location to declare person P4 (Deceased). Notify CASI Managers.

name: #SuspectArrest
controller_advice: Apprehension or detention of a person believed to have committed a crime:Gather information, document details, inform authorities

name: #SuspectedRevenge
controller_advice: Belief that someone is seeking retaliation or retribution:Gather information, advise caller to prioritize safety, involve authorities

name: #SuspiciousHumanActivity
controller_advice: Behaviors or actions that raise concerns about possible criminal intent:Gather details, advise caller to stay safe, notify authorities

name: #SuspiciousVehicle
controller_advice: Vehicle that raises suspicions due to its appearance or behavior:Gather details, advise caller to stay safe, report to authorities

name: #SystemMalfunctionAlarm
controller_advice: Validate the alarm. Contact the user if possible. Coordinate with the service provider to address the issue.

name: #TaxiInterference
controller_advice: Interference or disruption of an e-hailing service by the Taxi Association.: Advise the alerter to prioritize their safety, remain inside the vehicle, and avoid confrontation.

name: #TaxiViolence
controller_advice: Violent or aggressive behavior by the Taxi Association towards the driver of the e-hailing service.: Advise the caller to prioritize their safety, remain inside the vehicle, and avoid confrontation.

name: #TechnicalIssue
controller_advice: RO experienced a technical issue, ie. dashboard or app tech issue.: Help our partner if possible, else notify management on the Whatsapp group.

name: #Theft
controller_advice: This is a general tag for incidents where the property of a victim is taken without their permission with the intent to permanently deprive them of it.

name: #TheftOutOfMotorVehicle
controller_advice: Theft from a motor vehicle:Gather information, advise reporting to police, secure evidence

name: #ThirdPartyRequest
controller_advice: Use this tag when the person triggering the panic is requesting assistance for someone else or is at a different location from where they are using the ePanic app.

name: #Trespassing
controller_advice: Unauthorized entry onto someone else's property:Gather information, advise caller to secure themselves, inform authorities

name: #UnforcedEntryHouseRobbery
controller_advice: Unauthorized entry (without force) into a residential property with intent to commit a crime.:Advise person not to touch anything to preserve evidence. Call law enforcement.

name: #Unresponsive
controller_advice: When a user is unresponsive: Depending on the situation Ambulance should be dispatch ASAP.

name: #UserCancellation
controller_advice: Panic was canceled by the user.: Remember to first confirm the user's security code or last four digits of his/her cellphone number before cancelling armed response.

name: #UserNotFound
controller_advice: Use Tag for when the user cannot be found on scene by the RO

name: #UserTesting
controller_advice: The user tested the panic button. Resolve the panic once the user has confirmed his security code or last four digits.

name: #Vandalism
controller_advice: Action involving deliberate destruction of or damage to public or private property:Prioritize safety and respond swiftly. Contact authorities, use security tools for evidence, and cooperate with investigators for a quick resolution.

name: #VehicleAccident
controller_advice: 1. Check yourself for injuries. If you're injured, call medical services. 2. Check on the well-being of your passengers 3. Get to safety 4. Wait for help 5. Exchange information 6. Get necessary paperwork/documentation/ref#

name: #VehicleCollision
controller_advice: 1. Stop your car and stay on the scene. Switch on your hazards to warn other drivers. 2. Help anyone who has been hurt. 3. Get the details. 4. Report the accident.

name: #VehicleGoingOffRoute
controller_advice: The e-hailing vehicle deviates from the intended route or designated area.: Advise the alerter to prioritize their safety, remain calm, and avoid confrontation.

name: #VehicleTheft
controller_advice: Unlawful taking of another person's vehicle:Confirm the vehicle has been stolen, gather vehicle information. Contact law enforcement.

name: #VerbalThreat
controller_advice: Threat delivered through spoken words, either in person or over the phone:Advise the person to take threats seriously, document all instances, and contact law enforcement.

name: #Voicemail
controller_advice: Alerter call is directed to a voicemail/ mailbox.: Call again, or try to call the other participants (ride) or emergency contacts.

name: #WhatsApp
controller_advice: Client heard of CASI through WhatsApp marketing message.

name: #WordOfMouth
controller_advice: Client heard of CASI through word of mouth

name: #WrittenThreat
controller_advice: Threat delivered through written words, either physically or digitally:Advise the person to take threats seriously, preserve the evidence, and contact law enforcement.

name: #WrongDriver
controller_advice: The driver who arrived is not the one shown in the app: Advise the user not to take the ride. Notify Bolt support at southafrica@bolt.eu.

name: #WrongVehicle
controller_advice: The vehicle that arrived is not the one shown in the app: Advise the user not to take the ride. Notify Bolt support at southafrica@bolt.eu.

name: #ZoneViolation
controller_advice: Obtain the specific details of the zone violation, including the location and any suspicious activity observed. Instruct the caller to prioritize their own safety and avoid confronting the individual(s) directly. Notify the appropriate authorities or security personnel to respond and address the situation.
